1.premise: "Pronounced dead" can mean declared dead or saying "deadbeat dad."

2.premise: The only inheritance from a deadbeat dad is his most illicit or legally questionable assets.

1.premise: A handicap parking tag could be useful inheritance.

2.premise: Selling inherited prescription drugs is widely understood as illegal but rarely offered aloud.

lines.text: - Oh man, I am so happy to be here.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I've actually been going through a depression
lines.label: setup

lines.text: these last six years, you know, since the pandemic.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And it started when I lost my dad.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Did anybody else lose someone during that time
lines.label: setup

lines.text: when you couldn't be with your loved ones
lines.label: setup

lines.text: in their last moments?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I am sorry to bring the party down,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But I got the phone call and the lady was like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Is this Tina?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I said, "Yes."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And she said, "I'm so sorry to tell you this,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but your dad has been pronounced dead."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I was in shock and I was confused
lines.label: setup

lines.text: because my mom pronounces it deadbeat dad.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You guys don't have to feel bad for me.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He didn't leave a will,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but I did inherit his blue handicap parking tag.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: So where did y'all park?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: You know?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I do have all his leftover prescription drugs.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So if anybody has diabetes or high blood pressure,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm selling those outside two for five.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I guess now that my dad has passed away, I can't do it.
lines.label: setup
